channel.title: technology on errbufferoverfl
channel.description: Recent content in technology on errbufferoverfl

item.title: Ghost Work
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: “A startling exposé of the invisible human workforce that powers the web–and how to bring it out of the shadows. Hidden beneath the surface of the internet, a new, stark reality is looming–one that cuts to the very heart of our endless debates about the impact of AI.

item.title: The Age of Surveillance Capitalism
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: The challenges to humanity posed by the digital future, the first detailed examination of the unprecedented form of power called ‘surveillance capitalism,’ and the quest by powerful corporations to predict and control us.
